title: Serial block-face scanning electron microscopy to reconstruct three-dimensional tissue nanostructure
abstract: We describe serial block-face scanning electron microscopy (SBFSEM), using a microtome mounted inside a SEM to automatically cut and image successive thin sections of tissue, enabling automated 3D ultrastructural imaging at nanometer resolution.
notes: Already in existing 102. Invention of SBFSEM — foundational technology for connectomics.
